title: The Wing Where Other Nights Sleep

features.name: doorway that remembers
features.desc-on-touch: Each door here opened onto a different night for the same guest. You see the versions stacked: one where it rained, one where the neon flickered, one where no one came at all.

features.name: guest ledger wall
features.desc-on-touch: The register pages are filed here, written in rooms that diverged from rooms. Every name signed in a different hand from the same person.

features.name: branching hallway
features.desc-on-touch: The corridor ahead splits into versions of itself, each one a choice a sleeper almost made at 3am.

features.name: motel clock
features.desc-on-touch: It shows different times in each room's geometry. Behind the plastic, a faded poster in a language you can't read: BEACH SURGERY.

features.name: booking slips scattered
features.desc-on-touch: These cancellations and reservations from nights that didn't sync — guests who showed up to empty rooms, or didn't show to full ones.

inscription: in rooms where the same night learned to mean different things

file.name: Motel_Guest_Ledger_Branch_Versions.txt
file.note: Same arrival date, divergent nights — the archive cannot decide which guest was real

exits.label: back to the corridor where every room is tonight
up a stairwell that spirals through other hotels
out to a parking lot that contains all arrivals
down to the check-in desk where the ledger learns to choose
